eventMap.noMappedEvents: No events with map coordinates for the selected filters.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Annual running plan. Track events, goals and results.
login.emulatorHint: Emulator mode — no Google OAuth. See docs/emulators.md.

dashboard.noUpcoming: No upcoming planned or confirmed events.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Annual running plan. Filter by status and year.
events.emptyHint: Well then? Time to work up a sweat!
events.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
events.recoverMessage: Move "{{name}}" back to the bucket list? The event will be deleted.
events.recovered: "{{name}}" was recovered to the bucket list.

eventDetail.title: Event
eventDetail.recoverError: Could not recover the event to the bucket list.

eventMedia.title: Memories
eventMedia.empty: No photos or videos for this event yet.
eventMedia.limitsHint: Up to 10 files per event · photos up to 5 MB (JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC) · videos up to 2 min / 100 MB (MP4, MOV, WebM)
eventMedia.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this memory from "{{name}}"?
eventMedia.loadError: Could not load memories for this event.
eventMedia.offline: An internet connection is required to upload files.
eventMedia.uploadFailed: Could not upload the selected files.

eventForm.name: Event name
eventForm.statusAdjusted: Status was adjusted from «{{from}}» to «{{to}}» because of the date.
eventForm.invalidStatusDate: Invalid status for the selected date.
eventForm.removeBucketMessage: The event was created. Remove this item from the bucket list?
eventForm.emojiHint: Automatic suggestion by name, location and time of year. You can change it manually.
eventForm.resultsUrlHint: Required to import from Sporthive, Davengo, and other platforms.
eventForm.parkrunSetupHint: Parkrun events use your Parkrunner ID. Set it once to import all official Parkrun results.
eventForm.parkrunPromptMessage: Configure your Parkrunner ID once to access all official Parkrun results.

parkrun.eventHint: Search by name or location. Your favorites appear first.
parkrun.favoritesHint: Shown at the top when creating a parkrun event.

officialResults.settingsSubtitle: Set your name and identifiers to automatically import times from official event results.
officialResults.nameHint: Enter at least a first or last name as it appears in results. One field may be left blank.
officialResults.nameAliasesHint: Optional. One name per line, for when your name appears differently on platforms.
officialResults.parkrunnerIdInvalid: Enter all 7 digits of your Parkrunner ID.
officialResults.nameRequired: Enter at least a first or last name.
officialResults.saveError: Could not save the results profile.
officialResults.lookupHint: Search for your result on the organiser platform. Confirm before applying.
officialResults.notFound: No result found for your name.
officialResults.lookupError: Could not search results. Try again later.
officialResults.preconditionFailed: Configure your results profile or event link before searching.
officialResults.rateLimited: Please wait a few seconds before searching again.
officialResults.configureParkrun: Set your Parkrunner ID in settings to search Parkrun results.
officialResults.configurePlatform: Set your name in settings and the event results link.
officialResults.disclaimer: Import queries third-party timing sites; use may be subject to each platform’s terms.

resultsForm.title: Results
resultsForm.notAllowed: This event does not allow recording results.
resultsForm.notesPlaceholder: E.g.: Great pace, but can improve!

bucketList.title: Bucket list
bucketList.subtitle: Dream races. When you're ready, schedule them on the calendar.
bucketList.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
bucketList.nameHint: Type and distance are suggested automatically from the name.
bucketList.disciplinesHint: Select one or more. When scheduling, you choose which becomes the event.
bucketList.scheduleDisciplineMessage: Which discipline do you want to schedule for "{{name}}"?
bucketList.noMappedItems: No bucket list items with a map location for the selected filters.
bucketList.unmappedHint: These items need a valid location. Edit to fix or use autocomplete.
bucketList.mapClusterHint: Click a numbered circle to zoom in or expand items in the same area.

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Annual targets by event type. Progress comes from completed events.
goals.performanceSubtitle: PR, pace and time. Progress from your results.
goals.performanceEmptyHint: Set a PR, pace or time target for the season.
goals.deleteGoalMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
goals.countHint: Counts completed events of this type in the year

results.title: Results
results.subtitle: Times, paces and classifications from completed events.
results.chartEmptyAll: No results for the selected period

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: App preferences and data management.
settings.dataSubtitle: Import your annual plan from Excel or export all events for backup.
settings.exportUnavailable: Export is available when you have events or bucket list items.
settings.languageSubtitle: The app detects your browser language on first visit. You can change it here.
settings.themeSubtitle: Follows your system theme by default. You can change it here.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Reminders for planned or confirmed events with a future date.
notifications.platformNotes: Reminders are sent via push when the app is closed (Android and desktop). On iOS, install the PWA to your home screen. If the browser blocks notifications, missed reminders appear on your next visit.
notifications.unsupportedBrowser: This browser does not support local notifications.
notifications.permissionDeniedHint: Permission denied. Enable notifications in your browser or system settings.
notifications.enableForPermission: Enable reminders to request notification permission.
notifications.activateError: Could not enable notifications on this device.

import.title: Import Excel
import.replaceAll: Replace all existing data (deletes events, goals and bucket list before import)
import.subtitle: Import your annual plan from an .xlsx file (legacy Plano format or exported from the app).
import.dragDrop: Drag the file here or select below
import.noValidEvents: No valid events were found in this file.
import.readError: Could not read the Excel file.
import.importSuccess: Data imported! Your season is in the app. LET'S GO!
import.previewSummary: {{events}} events ({{withResults}} with results), {{goals}} goals, {{bucket}} bucket list items, {{skipped}} skipped rows
import.reportDeleted: 🗑️ {{events}} events, {{goals}} goals and {{bucket}} bucket list items deleted

messages.faltouAuto: {{name}}, event «{{event}}» has passed. Marked as Missed automatically.

validation.futureNoCompleted: Future events cannot be Completed or marked as Missed.
validation.resultsNotAllowed: Results can only be recorded for Confirmed or Completed events.
validation.distancePositive: Distance must be greater than zero.
validation.invalidLink: Link must start with http:// or https://
validation.targetPaceOnlyForPaceGoal: Target pace only applies to pace goals.
validation.targetTimeOnlyForTimeGoal: Target time only applies to time goals.
validation.prGoalNoTargetPace: PR goals do not have a target pace.
validation.prGoalNoTargetTime: PR goals do not have a target time.

errors.goalDuplicate: A goal of this type already exists for the selected year.
errors.goalTargetCountRange: Target count must be between 1 and {{max}}.
errors.performanceGoalLoadError: Could not load the performance goal.
errors.performanceGoalSaveError: Could not save the performance goal.
errors.performanceGoalDuplicate: A performance goal of this type already exists for the selected year.
errors.loginError: Could not sign in. Try again.
errors.offlineUnsupported: This browser does not support full offline mode (IndexedDB unavailable).

goalForm.notesPlaceholder: E.g.: Focus on spring half marathons

performanceGoalForm.paceAchievedHint: Goal achieved if the year's best pace is ≤ target
performanceGoalForm.prTargetHint: Goal achieved when you beat your all-time personal record in a completed race in {{year}}.
performanceGoalForm.notesPlaceholder: E.g.: Sub-45 at Lisbon half marathon

classification.invalid: Invalid classification. Use position/total or X of Y

performanceGoal.bestInYearPacePr: Best in {{year}}: {{pace}} min/km; historical PR: {{historicalPace}} min/km

shares.title: Shares
shares.subtitle: Invite friends and manage what you share or receive.
shares.settingsSubtitle: Invites, permissions, and shared data access.
shares.inviteSubtitle: Enter a registered user's email and choose what to share.
shares.inviteNeedsPermission: Select at least one section to share.
shares.sharedGoalsEmpty: No shared goals for this year.
shares.sharedPerformanceGoalsEmpty: No shared performance goals for this year.
shares.sharedBucketListEmpty: This bucket list is still empty.
shares.accessNotFound: Share not found or already revoked.

secondary: Breathe. The asphalt isn't going anywhere.
This takes less than a five-minute warm-up.
You might find you were slower. Or faster. Let's see.
Crunching paces… no judgement. Much.
The seconds will show up. No sprinting the refresh button.
While it loads, you can stretch. Or not. Also valid.
{{name}} ran. We'll handle the maths.

primary: Checking where {{name}} will hit the road…
Mapping where {{name}} will break a sweat…
secondary: Block the date in your head. Or don't. That works too.
Less spreadsheet, more running. Almost there.
Syncing the patience GPS.
Planned or confirmed. All incoming.
No date surprises. Just waiting on the connection.
{{name}} schedules. You peek. Fair play.

primary: Loading {{name}}'s goals. Spoiler: there's work ahead.
secondary: Inspiration or pressure? Depends on the day.
Goals in sight. Trainers still in the cupboard.
Comparing is human. Judging is optional.
Ambitious or realistic goals? We'll see.
The year's long. The goals, less so.
Healthy envy or pure motivation? Your call.
Dreams on a list. Loading someone else's dreams.
One day you're on someone's list too. Maybe.
Bucket list: where spreadsheets go to cry.
Dream races incoming. Tickets not included.
The bucket list won't run itself. The data will.
Inspiration from afar. Perfect for scrolling.
On its way. Promise.
Faster than a well-run 5K. Almost.
A few more seconds. Mental warm-up counts too.
The bytes are running. You're sitting. Ironic.
Almost there. Like that last kilometre.

events.hint: When {{name}} schedules races, they'll show up here. No WhatsApp needed.

results.hint: {{name}} hasn't shared any completed races with you yet. Or they're saving the best for last.

goals.title: No shared goals for this year.
goals.hint: {{name}} didn't share goals for {{year}}. Privacy is mental training too.

performanceGoals.title: No shared performance goals.
performanceGoals.hint: No PRs from {{name}} here. For now.

bucketList.title: Empty bucket list.
bucketList.hint: {{name}} hasn't dreamed out loud with you yet. Or did, and kept it private.

events.title: No events on the calendar yet.
events.hint: So? Today's a good day to work up a sweat!

results.title: No results recorded yet.
results.hint: Run, log, analyse. The virtuous cycle starts with one step.

goals.title: No goals for {{year}} yet.
goals.hint: Set targets for the season, the asphalt doesn't burn itself.

performanceGoals.title: No performance goals for {{year}} yet.
performanceGoals.hint: A PR, a pace, a target time. Pick your fight.

bucketList.title: No dream races on the bucket list yet.
bucketList.hint: Add the events you dream about.

success.import: Data imported! Your season is in the app. LET'S GO!
success.goalAchieved: Goal crushed! You knew you had it.
success.goalCrushed: Destroyed. The asphalt asks for mercy.
